issues: Uses generic 'Article Thumbnail' placeholders instead of actual images, indicating incomplete data.
Typography is generic; lacks a distinct display font and the 'FEATURED ARTICLE' text is too small.
Color palette is safe but generic, with a common AI-default purple accent and a hard-to-read 'AI' tag in the hero section.
The 'About Jane Doe' section has awkward horizontal whitespace due to overly narrow content.
strengths: Clean and uncluttered layout with good use of whitespace.
Consistent card-based display for recent articles.
Clear separation of content sections with appropriate headings.
specific_improvements: Replace all 'Article Thumbnail' placeholders with high-quality, relevant images to enhance visual appeal and data completeness.
Introduce a unique display font for headings and refine the type scale to add character and improve readability for smaller text elements.
Develop a more distinctive color palette that aligns with a specific brand identity, moving beyond generic purple and ensuring sufficient contrast for all text elements.
Adjust the content width in the 'About Jane Doe' section to better utilize horizontal space and improve visual balance.
